criteria.description: Provide a boring local build/test surface with make targets for build, Fortran tests, Python differential tests, clean, and full validation.
criteria.evidence: Makefile exposes build, test, python-test, fpm-test, validate, diff-check, and clean. `make validate` passed on 2026-06-09.
criteria.notes: The validation surface is intentionally simple and repo-local.

criteria.description: Provide fpm.toml package metadata or document precisely why fpm cannot yet represent the current layout.
criteria.evidence: fpm.toml exists. `make fpm-test` reports fpm is not installed on this host, and docs/BUILDING.md documents `make validate` as the canonical local validation path.
criteria.notes: fpm support is represented as package metadata plus a non-fatal optional test path until fpm is available locally.

criteria.description: Ensure project-facing docs and active mission artifacts use Frumpy names for current modules and paths while preserving historical identifiers where required.
criteria.evidence: Current-facing stale pre-rename-name check printed no matches across README.md, PROJECT_PLAN.md, STYLE_GUIDE.md, AGENTS.md, SPEC_KITTY_HANDOFF.md, .kittify/charter/charter.md, and the active mission docs, excluding historical/generated metadata.
criteria.notes: Historical mission slugs and generated status metadata retain old identifiers only where required for traceability.

criteria.description: Make frumpy_dtypes the single authoritative source for dtype IDs, names, byte sizes, support state, and planned/unsupported status behavior.
criteria.evidence: src/frumpy_dtypes.f90 defines dtype IDs, names, byte sizes, support states, and status behavior. test/test_dtypes.f90 and docs/DTYPE_METADATA.md verify and document the registry.
criteria.notes: The metadata table remains the authority used by later promotion, casting, and descriptor work.

criteria.description: Define a table-driven dtype promotion API for the supported dtype subset.
criteria.evidence: src/frumpy_promotion.f90 implements table-driven promote_dtypes, promote_scalar_dtype, and is_supported_promotion APIs. test/test_dtype_promotion.f90 passed through `make validate`.
criteria.notes: Promotion policy is centralized rather than duplicated inside kernels.

criteria.description: Match NumPy promotion behavior for the supported dtype pairs, or document and test any intentional difference.
criteria.evidence: python/tests/test_numpy_dtype_promotion.py passed against NumPy 2.4.6. docs/DTYPE_PROMOTION.md records the supported policy and no intentional differences for covered pairs.
criteria.notes: The supported promotion subset is pinned to differential fixtures rather than memory or guesswork.

criteria.description: Implement cast/copy kernels for the selected supported dtype pairs without duplicating promotion logic in kernel modules.
criteria.evidence: src/frumpy_casting.f90 implements cast status policy and scalar cast helpers. test/test_casting.f90 and python/tests/test_numpy_casting.py passed.
criteria.notes: Casting checks status and safety policy directly while leaving promotion decisions in frumpy_promotion.

criteria.description: Add concrete descriptor/storage modules for selected non-r64 dtypes in a way that keeps the r64 path readable.
criteria.evidence: src/frumpy_ndarray_bool.f90, src/frumpy_ndarray_i32.f90, src/frumpy_ndarray_i64.f90, and src/frumpy_ndarray_r32.f90 add concrete descriptor/storage modules with matching Fortran tests.
criteria.notes: The bool descriptor uses a one-byte int8 payload to keep representation explicit.

criteria.description: Add Fortran tests for dtype metadata, support state, promotion decisions, cast behavior, and unsupported dtype statuses.
criteria.evidence: `make validate` passed the dtype-focused Fortran tests: test_dtypes, test_dtype_promotion, test_casting, non-r64 descriptor tests, and existing r64 tests.
criteria.notes: Unsupported and planned dtype statuses are covered by registry and policy tests.

criteria.description: Add Python NumPy differential fixtures for the supported promotion and casting subset.
criteria.evidence: Focused Python fixtures passed with `.venv/bin/python -m pytest -q python/tests/test_numpy_dtype_promotion.py python/tests/test_numpy_casting.py`: 6 passed under NumPy 2.4.6.
criteria.notes: The repo-local virtual environment preserves the project's host Python policy.

criteria.description: Document the complex dtype plan and object dtype non-support.
criteria.evidence: docs/DTYPE_SUPPORT.md documents object dtype as unsupported, docs/COMPLEX_DTYPE_PLAN.md records the complex dtype roadmap, and docs/DTYPE_METADATA.md lists unsupported categories.
criteria.notes: The documentation keeps planned dtype work visible without implying implementation.

criteria.description: Preserve existing r64 constructor, broadcasting, elementwise, reduction, and view behavior.
criteria.evidence: `make validate` passed existing r64 constructors, broadcasting, elementwise operations, reductions, views, and descriptor tests after the dtype expansion work.
criteria.notes: The mission adds dtype infrastructure without regressing the original r64 path.

negative_invariants.description: Do not expand project scope into Torch, Diffusers, autograd, GPU runtime design, model loading, or training infrastructure.
negative_invariants.evidence: Mission changes are limited to Frumpy build/test tooling, project naming reconciliation, dtype metadata, promotion, casting, non-r64 descriptors, and dtype documentation.

negative_invariants.description: Do not install project-specific Python packages into the host Python environment.
negative_invariants.evidence: Python validation used the repo-local .venv path.
